Moin moin 


kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update devel/cmake to 3.20.4

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-devel-cmake-update-to-3.20.4.patch



mfg Tobias
